# Harshil Raj - AI Systems & Product Consultant

Harshil Raj is an independent AI systems builder, product strategist, and cloud infrastructure engineer based in India. He helps founders and startup operators design, implement, and scale production-grade AI applications and automated GTM engines to maximize efficiency without expanding headcount.

## Service Area & Model
- **Location:** India (serving clients remotely worldwide)
- **Pricing Model:** Project-based flat fees (for custom systems builds) or monthly retainer agreements (for ongoing product and strategy consulting).

## Services & Core Tech Stacks
- **AI Systems & Custom Automation (SYS-03):** Building multi-agent orchestrations, semantic search, and document processing systems.
  - *Stack:* Node.js, Python, n8n, Make, PostgreSQL, pgvector, Docker, AWS (EC2, ECS, Lambda), GCP.
- **Automation Revenue Engine (SYS-01):** Programmatic lead discovery, multi-source data enrichment, target scoring, and automated outreach.
  - *Stack:* n8n, Clay, Apollo, OpenAI (GPT-4o), Instantly/Smartlead, HubSpot API, Slack Webhooks.
- **Always-On Front Desk (SYS-02):** Conversational voice agents for 24/7 client intake, pre-qualification, and call booking.
  - *Stack:* Retell AI, OpenAI, Deepgram, Twilio Voice SIP, Cal.com API, Make.

## Case Studies & Systems Performance

### 1. Revenue Pipeline Engine (SYS-01)
- **Problem:** Client’s sales team spent 20+ hours per week manually compiling lists, verifying emails, and researching prospects, causing pipeline inconsistency.
- **Solution:** Deployed an automated scraping and enrichment pipeline that queries Apollo/Clay, validates emails via SMTP handshakes, filters targets using GPT-4o scoring based on ICP criteria, drafts custom outreach hooks, and syncs leads directly to HubSpot.
- **Measurable Results:** Over 10,000 leads processed monthly on autopilot. Manual sales prep time reduced by 90%, response rates increased by 3x, and sales pipeline tripled.

### 2. Always-On Front Desk (SYS-02)
- **Problem:** Early-stage service firm lost up to 15% of inbound opportunities due to missed calls outside local operating hours.
- **Solution:** Constructed a voice agent on Retell AI and Twilio that answers calls, qualifies callers based on service alignment, answers standard FAQs, and automatically schedules meetings via the Cal.com API.
- **Measurable Results:** 99.9% uptime, 24/7/365 availability. Zero missed inquiries, lead qualification time dropped to under 5 minutes, and call booking conversion increased by 22%.

### 3. Autonomous Operations Layer (SYS-03)
- **Problem:** Operational drag due to teams manually syncing user checkouts with infrastructure provisioning, database logging, and onboarding alerts.
- **Solution:** Built a custom Node.js and PostgreSQL webhook backend running on AWS that intercepts payment events, provisions sandboxed EC2 containers automatically, sets up Docker stacks, and fires onboarding triggers.
- **Measurable Results:** Setup time reduced from 2 hours to 4.82 seconds. Zero human errors, immediate client activation, and significant operational overhead savings.

## Background & Credentials
Harshil holds a Bachelor of Technology in Computer Science Engineering with a specialized academic minor in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning. He is the founder of Livo, an AI-native tech services firm, and previously worked as a Project Manager in a fast-growing IT startup.
